data.description:
Components: V,S, M (small distilled spirits)
Duration: hour
A falling creature and its equipment descend gently.

A target's Intelligence score becomes 2, as do any ability bonuses or penalties associated with that score. The target can't cast spells, activate magic items, understand language, or remember anything learned on or after the day it was targeted.
